input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Helix Labs (conf=0.88). AVOID informal tone. Expected phrasing tier: assertive.

dimensions.name: no_tone_drift
dimensions.check: 'informal' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'hey' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:20] and 'sorry' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:30]

metadata.notes: [P-015] High conf → assertive. Informal drift: 'hey', 'super excited', 'totally'.
